chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-929 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of MA 4611/13 3. For hearing of MA 993/15 4. For orders on M.A 2342/16 21.11.2017. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate, alongwith petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel. Mr. Kamaluddin, Advocate for respondent-university. Mr. Nisar Ahmed Durrani, the Principal, Government Sindh Law College, Hyderabad has appeared and states that he is ready to pay all the arrears to the petitioner and already in this regard an arrangement has been reached between the parties. Petitioner, who is present in person, has confirmed this fact and states that in view of such statement he does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition in above terms is disposed of alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
